visual_description: A close-up, profile shot focuses on a middle-aged man with a somber expression. He is wearing a white collared shirt and a dark tie. The lighting is dim and cool-toned, casting shadows on his face. To the right, the out-of-focus profile of another man is visible. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is present. White Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the frame. The camera remains static, creating an intimate and serious mood. A man speaks in a low, somber, and reflective tone, his voice filled with a sense of weary resignation. He says, "没人明白的" (No one understands). The scene cuts to a high-angle, wide shot of a dimly lit interrogation room. Three men are seated around a large, dark table. The man from the previous shot, in the white shirt, sits at the head of the table, looking down with a dejected posture. To his right, another man in a denim shirt looks down, fiddling with his hands. At the far end of the table, a third man, seen from the back, is also looking down. On the table are two open briefcases, one of which contains stacks of cash
